title: Fmag_Enabled Property
description: Activates/inactivates the trigger based on Fmag resultant force, or returns the status thereof.
notes:
This activates/inactivates or returns the trigger, which is tripped by the resultant force Fmag.

See Also: Fmag_Enabled Property

Fmag_Axes Property
see_also:
Applies To

Force Control

Force Trigger
